assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 41 of claude-md-result.md contains '## Security Configuration'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 43-49 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Product Lifecycle' followed by all 5 fields: 'Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle' (line 45), 'Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT' (line 46), 'Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200' (line 47), 'Component label pattern: pscomponent:' (line 48), 'VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345' (line 49).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 51-55 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Version Streams' with a table. Line 55 has a row: '| 2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md |'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 57-62 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Source Repositories' with a table. Line 61: '| backend | https://github.com/example/backend |' and line 62: '| frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui |'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence with Limitations, and Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md contains: '## Repository Registry' (line 3) with a 2-row table, '## Jira Configuration' (line 10) with all fields, '## Code Intelligence' (line 18) with '### Limitations' (line 31), and '## Bug Configuration' (line 35) with all fields.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 35-39 of claude-md-result.md contain '## Bug Configuration' with: 'Bug issue type ID: 10001' (line 37), 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md' (line 38), 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks' (line 39).

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 63-79 of discovery-log.md (Step 9 -- Security Configuration) state: 'User accepted enabling security triage' (line 66), followed by 'Product Lifecycle fields collected:' (line 67) listing all 5 fields (lines 68-72), 'Version Streams collected (1 stream)' (line 73), and 'Source Repositories collected (2 repos)' (lines 75-77).

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration and Bug Configuration were newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md summary (line 5) states: 'All sections were created from scratch since the existing CLAUDE.md had no Project Configuration.' Section headers confirm: '### 1. Repository Registry (CREATED)' (line 9), '### 2. Jira Configuration (CREATED)' (line 18), '### 3. Code Intelligence (CREATED)' (line 28), '### 4.
